sections.heading: Secs. 10-14e to 10-14h. Taking of proficiency examination required for high school students. Non-high-school students eligible to take proficiency examination. Duties of State Board of Education. Effective date.

body: Secs. 10-14e to 10-14h. Taking of proficiency examination required for high school students. Non-high-school students eligible to take proficiency examination. Duties of State Board of Education. Effective date. Sections 10-14e to 10-14h , inclusive, are repealed.
content.plainText: Secs. 10-14e to 10-14h. Taking of proficiency examination required for high school students. Non-high-school students eligible to take proficiency examination. Duties of State Board of Education. Effective date. Sections 10-14e to 10-14h , inclusive, are repealed.
